value.layout: {"params":{"offsetX":{"type":"number","optional":true,"value":0,"tooltip":"Meters to travel along the X axis, relative to the platform's start position."},"offsetY":{"type":"number","optional":true,"value":4,"tooltip":"Meters to travel along the Y axis, relative to the platform's start position."},"offsetZ":{"type":"number","optional":true,"value":0,"tooltip":"Meters to travel along the Z axis, relative to the platform's start position."},"duration":{"type":"number","optional":true,"value":5,"tooltip":"Seconds it takes to travel from one end to the other."},"autoStart":{"type":"boolean","optional":true,"value":true,"tooltip":"If true, the platform starts moving when the scene loads."},"loop":{"type":"boolean","optional":true,"value":true,"tooltip":"If true, the platform keeps moving back and forth.
